title: agropyron cristatum subsp. pumilum
intro: Agropyron cristatum subsp. pumilum, also known as dwarf crested wheat grass, is a subspecies of the Agropyron cristatum plant that is commonly found in mountainous regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Agropyron cristatum subsp. pumilum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Agropyron cristatum subsp. pumilum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
